title: zanthoxylum martinicense subsp. amoyense
intro: Zanthoxylum martinicense subsp. amoyense, also known as Szechuan pepper, is a plant species in the rutaceous family native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum martinicense subsp. amoyense include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as nausea, headaches, and colds.
